summary: Athlete Store Migration (Step 1.1) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: Director and Coach dashboards load correctly with accurate KPIs. All athlete data now reads from MongoDB via services/athlete_store.py. Derived data (interventions, signals, attention alerts) correctly recomputed from DB.
critical_code_review_comments: athlete_store.py correctly implements canonical data access layer with sync getters and async recompute_derived_data()
All 13 backend files successfully migrated from ATHLETES import to athlete_store calls
Dual-write patterns removed - writes go to DB only, then cache refreshed via recompute_derived_data()
startup.py correctly initializes athlete cache from DB and computes derived data
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 25 athletes seeded from mock_data to MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Athlete store migration verified. Key endpoints tested: (1) GET /api/mission-control - Director sees totalAthletes=25, needingAttention=12; Coach sees myRoster with 13 athletes. (2) GET /api/roster - Returns 25 athletes with teamGroups (3 teams), ageGroups (3 age groups), summary with coach_count=7. (3) GET /api/roster/coaches - Returns 7 coaches. (4) POST /api/roster/bulk-assign, bulk-remind, bulk-note - All working with DB-backed data. (5) POST /api/athletes/{id}/reassign - Works and triggers recompute_derived_data(). (6) GET /api/debug/interventions - Returns 19 interventions computed from DB data.

mission_control_director.details: Returns role=director, programStatus with totalAthletes=25, needingAttention=12, upcomingEvents=5

mission_control_coach.details: Returns role=coach with myRoster (13 athletes), todays_summary KPIs

roster_endpoint.details: Returns 25 athletes with enriched data, teamGroups (3), ageGroups (3), summary correct

roster_coaches.details: Returns list of 7 coaches with id, name, email

bulk_assign.details: Updates athletes in DB, refreshes cache via recompute_derived_data()

bulk_remind.details: Creates reminder notes in coach_notes collection

reassign_athlete.details: Updates DB, logs to reassignment_log, calls recompute_derived_data()

debug_interventions.details: Returns 19 interventions computed from DB athletes

coach_ownership_boundary.details: Coach forbidden from /api/roster (403), can only see assigned athletes in myRoster
